intelligence_scores.description: Intelligence test scores of the 9 sampled children, used to compute the sample mean x̄=112.8.

population_mean.description: Population mean (μ) of the intelligence test scores under the null hypothesis.

population_std.description: Population standard deviation (σ) of the intelligence test scores.

sample_size.description: Number of children in the sample (n=9), used to compute the standard error.
